creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Upstream withdraw version 1.6.2:
https://sourceforge.net/p/qlandkartegt/mailman/message/35220014/
and released 1.6.3:
https://sourceforge.net/p/qlandkartegt/mailman/message/35220366/

I'm happy to announce that I managed to upstream FreeBSD support - that is, most "ports patches" are not required anymore, and GPS devices ("newer Garmin and TwoNav devices") should be supported now via sysutils/bsdisks. In case of breakage, all blame belongs to me :)
